data.title: ZCCM-IH Engages in Arbitration with Trafigura Over Guarantee Dispute
data.description:
ZCCM Investments Holdings ( (FR:MLZAM) ) just unveiled an update.

ZCCM Investments Holdings PLC is currently involved in confidential arbitration proceedings with Trafigura Pte Limited. The dispute arises from a guarantee signed in 2021 related to a prepayment agreement involving Konkola Copper Mines Plc. ZCCM-IH is contesting the claims and advises shareholders to exercise caution when dealing with its securities due to the potential price-sensitive nature of the proceedings.

More about ZCCM Investments Holdings

ZCCM Investments Holdings PLC is a company incorporated in the Republic of Zambia, operating within the investment sector. It is involved in various ventures, including mining, and holds shares in companies such as Konkola Copper Mines Plc.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Announces New Share Buyback Program
data.description:
The latest update is out from Fairfax Financial Holdings ( (TSE:FFH) ).

On September 26, 2025, Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited announced its intention to commence a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB) for its Subordinate Voting Shares and several series of Preferred Shares, as approved by the Toronto Stock Exchange. The NCIB, effective from September 30, 2025, to September 29, 2026, aims to purchase shares that Fairfax believes represent an attractive investment opportunity, potentially enhancing shareholder value. Fairfax has also implemented an automatic share purchase plan to facilitate purchases during regulatory or internal trading black-out periods.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FFH) stock is a Buy with a C$2712.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fairfax Financial Holdings stock, see the TSE:FFH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FFH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FFH is a Outperform.

Fairfax Financial Holdings’ strong financial performance and attractive valuation are key strengths, supported by robust earnings growth and investment gains. Technical indicators suggest a neutral trend, while challenges in specific segments slightly temper the overall outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FFH stock, click here.

More about Fairfax Financial Holdings

Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited is a holding company primarily engaged in property and casualty insurance and reinsurance, along with associated investment management, through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Federal-Mogul Goetze Announces Trading Window Closure
data.description:
Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited ( (IN:FMGOETZE) ) has provided an update.

Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited has announced the closure of its trading window in compliance with SEBI’s Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015. This measure will be in effect from October 1, 2025, until three days after the board meeting for the approval of the company’s unaudited financial results for the quarter and half-year ending September 30, 2025. This decision is aimed at preventing insider trading and ensuring transparency during the financial results’ consideration period.

More about Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited

Federal-Mogul Goetze (India) Limited is a part of the Tenneco Group, operating in the automotive industry. The company is involved in manufacturing and supplying components for automotive engines, focusing on enhancing engine performance and efficiency.

Average Trading Volume: 10,434

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 30.56B INR

data.title: Bergman & Beving Announces Full Subscription of Share-Based Incentive Scheme
data.description:
Bergman & Beving AB Class B ( ($SE:BERG.B) ) has provided an announcement.

Bergman & Beving AB has announced the full subscription of its share-based incentive scheme, which was approved at the 2025 Annual General Meeting. This scheme allows around 25 senior management members to acquire up to 200,000 call options on repurchased class B shares, priced at SEK 46.75 per option. The redemption price is set at SEK 395.30, and the options can be exercised between September 2028 and June 2029. This initiative is part of the company’s strategy to align management interests with shareholder value and enhance its competitive positioning in the market.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:BERG.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK310.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bergman & Beving AB Class B stock, see the SE:BERG.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Bergman & Beving AB Class B

Bergman & Beving AB is a Swedish listed group founded in 1906, focusing on acquiring and developing leading companies with a long-term ownership approach. The group operates in industrial and construction sectors, providing value-adding solutions through its autonomous companies. Bergman & Beving is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, employs approximately 1,400 people, and has a turnover of about SEK 5 billion, with operations in over 25 countries.

Average Trading Volume: 22,190

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK8.98B

data.title: Invesco DB Agriculture Fund Index Changes Announced
data.description:
An update from Invesco DB Agriculture Fund ( (DBA) ) is now available.

On November 10, 2025, changes will be made to the DBIQ Diversified Agriculture Index Excess Return, which the Invesco DB Agriculture Fund tracks. These changes, implemented by Deutsche Bank AG, include expanding the commodity universe, modifying the Optimum Yield methodology, and introducing annual reviews of base weights and commodities. Additionally, sector and single commodity caps and floors will be implemented to reduce concentration risk, and intra-year rebalancing events will be introduced to prevent significant deviations from target weights. These adjustments aim to enhance the index’s reflection of global production and market liquidity without affecting the Fund’s investment objective.

More about Invesco DB Agriculture Fund

Average Trading Volume: 208,848

Current Market Cap: $796.3M

data.title: China Everbright Bank Proposes New Board Members for Tenth Session
data.description:
China Everbright Bank Co ( (HK:6818) ) has issued an update.

China Everbright Bank Co. has announced the proposed election of members for the tenth session of its Board of Directors following the expiration of the ninth session. Several directors will retire and not seek re-election, with new appointments proposed for non-executive, executive, and independent non-executive director roles. This transition is expected to bring fresh perspectives to the board, potentially impacting the bank’s strategic direction and governance.

data.title: Foresight Enterprise VCT Reports Modest NAV Growth Amid Economic Challenges
data.description:
An update from Foresight 4 VCT ( (GB:FTF) ) is now available.

Foresight Enterprise VCT plc reported a slight increase in Net Asset Value (NAV) Total Return of 0.4% for the half-year ending 30 June 2025, despite challenging economic conditions marked by slow growth and rising inflation. The company successfully exited its investment in Hospital Services Group Limited, realizing significant gains, and made several new and follow-on investments. The company paid special and interim dividends to shareholders and maintained a strategic focus on growth, dividend payments, and share buybacks. The board remains optimistic about future investment opportunities despite the challenging economic and geopolitical landscape.

More about Foresight 4 VCT

Foresight Enterprise VCT plc operates in the venture capital trust industry, focusing on investing in small to medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) across various sectors in the UK. The company is managed by Foresight Group LLP, which provides investment management and administration services, leveraging its regional presence to source and complete attractive investment opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 81,811

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:
